use_cases: Trigger form submissions in authentication flows
Execute primary actions like save, submit, or confirm
Navigate users between pages or sections
Provide accessible action triggers with keyboard support
ai_summary: A reusable button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority, providing multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, small, large, icon). Features standard focus-visible ring states, hover effects, and disabled states for accessibility. Clean flat styling with Tailwind CSS, making it a foundational atomic component for any React application requiring action triggers.
